publication_boundary: This is a compact cryptographic trace. It publishes hashes, sizes, source classes, and Merkle roots; bulky raw source bodies remain outside the repo unless deliberately promoted.

truth_boundary.exact_now: Source bodies, normalized event file, and repo-served trace artifacts have SHA-256 hashes and Merkle roots.
truth_boundary.next_precision: For exact row-to-source-body proofs in every API slice, normalized rows should gain source_body_id and event_hash fields during ingestion.
